SEARCH
Package common.dto

Class ReservationDTO

java.lang.Object
common.dto.ReservationDTO
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ReservationDTO extends Object implements Serializable
Immutable data transfer object representing a single park reservation.

Instances are created server-side by ReservationDAO from a database row and serialized across the socket to the client inside a ServerResponse. Date/time fields are carried as strings (ISO yyyy-MM-dd for the visit date) to avoid coupling the wire format to java.sql types.

Columns that are nullable in the database (guide_id, confirmation_code) are modelled with boxed Long/Integer so a SQL NULL maps to a Java null rather than a misleading zero.

See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private Integer
    confirmationCode
    Booking confirmation code, or null if not yet issued.
    private String
    createdAt
    Timestamp the reservation row was created (DB DATETIME as string).
    private Long
    guideId
    Identifier of the assigned guide, or null if none.
    private int
    id
    Unique reservation identifier (primary key).
    private boolean
    isGroup
    Whether this booking is treated as an organised group.
    private boolean
    paidInAdvance
    Whether the reservation was paid for in advance.
    private int
    parkId
    Identifier of the park this reservation is booked against.
    private int
    partySize
    Number of people in the party.
    private int
    priceCents
    Price of the reservation, in cents.
    private static final long
    serialVersionUID
    Serialization identifier for this class.
    private ReservationStatus
    status
    Current lifecycle state of the reservation.
    private String
    visitDate
    Scheduled visit date, ISO yyyy-MM-dd.
    private long
    visitorId
    National-ID-style identifier of the owning visitor.
    private String
    visitTime
    Scheduled visit time (HH:mm:ss), or null if unset.
    private VisitType
    visitType
    Nature of the visit (individual/family/group).

  • Constructor Details

    • ReservationDTO

      public ReservationDTO(int id, int parkId, long visitorId, String visitDate, String visitTime, int partySize, VisitType visitType, ReservationStatus status, boolean isGroup, Long guideId, int priceCents, boolean paidInAdvance, Integer confirmationCode, String createdAt)
      Creates a fully populated reservation.
      Parameters:
      id - unique reservation identifier
      parkId - identifier of the booked park
      visitorId - identifier of the owning visitor
      visitDate - scheduled visit date, ISO yyyy-MM-dd
      visitTime - scheduled visit time (HH:mm:ss), or null
      partySize - number of people in the party
      visitType - nature of the visit
      status - current lifecycle state
      isGroup - whether the booking is an organised group
      guideId - identifier of the assigned guide, or null
      priceCents - price of the reservation, in cents
      paidInAdvance - whether the reservation was paid in advance
      confirmationCode - booking confirmation code, or null
      createdAt - creation timestamp as a string
